calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Temporary Restraining Order And Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Duane S. Oliveira, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party 599 Design Group, Inc. Joseph G. Tursi, Esq., 650-524-1980, for defendant and opposing party Phoenix Industries.

Argued and the court denies plaintiff 599 Design Group, Inc.'s request for preliminary injunction. The temporary restraining order issued on 2-1-2012 is dissolved. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Not reported.
